summary: Iteration 26 - All new features tested successfully. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed (cloud storage upload returns full URLs, property verification toggle works for admin only, rate limiting returns 429, procedure detail has steps/files/quick actions for guided view, SEO meta tags present). Frontend: Procedure detail page shows step-by-step guided view with progress bar, country flag, complexity badge, tags, downloadable files, quick actions sidebar. Property detail page shows 'Verifie' button for admin users. PropertyCard shows green 'Verifie' badge for verified properties. Footer contains matrixnews.org link. SEO meta tags (og:url, og:title, og:description) correctly reference matrixnews.org.

backend_api: POST /api/upload - Returns permanent cloud URL starting with https:// and containing /api/media/cloud/
POST /api/properties/{id}/verify - Admin can toggle is_verified badge
Rate limiting - Returns 429 after 30+ rapid requests to /api/auth/login
GET /api/procedures/{id} - Returns procedure with steps, files, country_flag, complexity, quick_actions
GET / - HTML has og:url=https://matrixnews.org, og:title, og:description meta tags
GET /api/properties - Property list includes is_verified field
frontend_ui: Footer - Shows 'matrixnews.org' link with correct href
SEO - og:url meta tag contains https://matrixnews.org
SEO - og:title meta tag: 'Matrix News | Actualites, Immobilier & Services - Guinee'
Procedure detail page (/procedures/{id}) - Step-by-step guided view with expandable steps
Procedure detail page - Progress bar shows X/Y completees (e.g., 0/3 -> 1/3)
Procedure detail page - Steps can be marked as complete with visual feedback (green checkmark)
Procedure detail page - Country flag displayed (from flagcdn.com)
Procedure detail page - Category shown (e.g., Visa / Immigration)
Procedure detail page - Complexity badge shown (Facile/Modere/Difficile)
Procedure detail page - Tags displayed (e.g., Visa, Canada, Tourisme)
Procedure detail page - Quick actions sidebar with action buttons
Procedure detail page - Downloadable files section with file list
Property detail page - Admin sees 'VERIFIE' toggle button (data-testid=verify-property-btn)
Property detail page - Green 'Verifie' badge shown when property is verified
PropertyCard - Shows green 'Verifie' badge (data-testid=verified-badge) for verified properties

critical_code_review_comments: Cloud storage integration working correctly - upload.py uses put_object and get_public_url from cloud_storage module
Property verification correctly restricted to admin via require_admin dependency
Rate limiting middleware properly uses X-Forwarded-For header for real client IP detection
Procedure detail page has all required data-testid attributes for testing
PropertyCard correctly displays is_verified badge with ShieldCheck icon
SEO meta tags properly configured with matrixnews.org domain
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (procedure 62cfc5a7..., property 438115d8...)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 tested cloud storage uploads (returns permanent URLs like https://domain/api/media/cloud/matrixnews/images/xxx.png), property verification badges (admin-only toggle via /api/properties/{id}/verify), rate limiting on auth endpoints (429 after 30 requests), procedure step-by-step guided view, and SEO meta tags (matrixnews.org). All features working. Login route is /connexion. Property 438115d8 is verified (is_verified=true). Procedure 62cfc5a7 has 3 steps and 2 files.
